briefdescription.para: Get the current color.

simplesect.para: The currently tracked terminal color state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current character attributes.

simplesect.para: The currently tracked character attribute state.

briefdescription.para: Get the current combined text style.
Set foreground and background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set all character attributes.

detaileddescription.para:
Unspecified attributes are treated as disabled.
attributes
The new character attributes.

briefdescription.para: Set the full terminal style.

detaileddescription.para:
Inherited colors are converted to defaults and unspecified attributes are treated as disabled.
style
The new combined style.

memberdef.argsstring: (const Foreground foregroundColor, const Background backgroundColor) noexcept
memberdef.name: setColor

briefdescription.para: Set foreground and background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the foreground color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the background color.

simplesect.para: Inherited colors are converted to Default colors.

briefdescription.para: Set the terminal default foreground and background colors.
Get the character attributes supported by this writer.
Enable or disable the bold attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable bold, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the dim attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable dim, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the italic attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable italic, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the underline attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable underline, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the blink attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable blink, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the reverse attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable reverse, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the hidden attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable hidden, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Enable or disable the strikethrough attribute.

parameterdescription.para: true to enable strikethrough, false to disable it.

briefdescription.para: Move the cursor to the left.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
count
The number of terminal cells to move.

briefdescription.para: Move the cursor to the right.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
count
The number of terminal cells to move.

briefdescription.para: Move the cursor up.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
count
The number of terminal cells to move.

briefdescription.para: Move the cursor down.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
count
The number of terminal cells to move.

briefdescription.para: Move the cursor to the given position.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
pos
The position to move the cursor to.

briefdescription.para: Moves the cursor to the home position.
Move the cursor absolute or relative.

detaileddescription.para:
If the resulting position is out of bounds, the result is undefined.
posOrDelta
The absolute position or delta for the move.
mode
The move mode, either absolute or relative.

briefdescription.para: Try to get the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
Not all implementations support retrieving the cursor position.
The current cursor position, or std::nullopt if it cannot be determined.

briefdescription.para: Enabled/disable auto-wrap.

detaileddescription.para:
Auto wrap controls if the cursor automatically wraps to the next line when reaching the right margin. This is a feature that can be enabled or disabled. Do not confuse this with line wrapping, which is a different feature.
enabled
Whether to enable or disable auto-wrap.

briefdescription.para: Make the cursor visible/invisible.

detaileddescription.para:
Not all implementations support changing the cursor visibility.
visible
Whether to make the cursor visible or invisible.

briefdescription.para: Get the size of the screen/writing area.
Clears the screen/writing area.
Write a character at the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
Inherited color components resolve against the currently active color. Overwrites the character under the cursor.
character
The character to write.

briefdescription.para: Write a string at the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
Inherited color components in each character resolve against the currently active color. Overwrites the characters under the cursor.
str
The string to write.

briefdescription.para: Write a string whose characters are already fully resolved against the writer state.

detaileddescription.para:
This bypasses any additional inherited-style resolution in implementations that can optimize for it.
str
The already resolved string to write.

briefdescription.para: Write a character that is already fully resolved against the writer state.

detaileddescription.para:
This bypasses any additional inherited-style resolution in implementations that can optimize for it.
character
The already resolved character to write.

briefdescription.para: Write the same character multiple times at the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
Inherited color components resolve against the currently active color for each repetition. A non-positive count is ignored.
character
The character to repeat.
count
The number of repetitions.

briefdescription.para: Write the same fully resolved character multiple times at the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
This bypasses any additional inherited-style resolution in implementations that can optimize for it. A non-positive count is ignored.
character
The already resolved character to repeat.
count
The number of repetitions.

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts. Invalid UTF-8 bytes are replaced with the Unicode replacement character.
This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Write a buffer at the current cursor position.

detaileddescription.para:
This will not perform any additional formatting, clipping, or processing. Each line of the buffer will be written, and a line-break added after each line.
buffer
The buffer to write.

briefdescription.para: Write a line-break.

detaileddescription.para: This will move the cursor to the beginning of the next line.

briefdescription.para: Print elements at the cursor position.
Print elements at the cursor position and add a line break.
Print a word-wrapped paragraph at the cursor position.

parameterdescription.para: The paragraph text to write. Can use line breaks and tabs, see documentation.

simplesect.para: The number of lines written (including empty lines).

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::string_view paragraph, const ParagraphOptions &options=ParagraphOptions::defaultOptions()) noexcept -> int
memberdef.name: printParagraph

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts. Invalid UTF-8 bytes are replaced with the Unicode replacement character.

memberdef.argsstring: (const std::u32string_view paragraph, const ParagraphOptions &options=ParagraphOptions::defaultOptions()) noexcept -> int
memberdef.name: printParagraph

briefdescription.para: This is an overloaded member function, provided for convenience. It differs from the above function only in what argument(s) it accepts.
Implementation hook for paragraph printing.

detaileddescription.para:
Derived classes render the paragraph with their own cursor and wrapping behavior.
paragraph
The paragraph text to print.
options
The paragraph layout settings to apply.
The number of rendered lines.

briefdescription.para: Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
Handle one argument passed to print() or printLine().
The shared interface for buffers/terminals that support cursor-based output.
